additionalInfo.description: Pull task data from an API endpoint and use AI to generate a structured weekly report in Markdown format.

inputSchema.name: api_url
inputSchema.description: The API endpoint to fetch task/project data from

additionalInfo.description: Fetch task and project data from the configured API

configuration.prompt:
You are a project manager assistant. Based on the following task data, generate a professional weekly report in Markdown format.

Include these sections:
1. **Summary** - A brief overview of progress this week
2. **Completed Tasks** - List tasks that were finished
3. **In Progress** - Tasks currently being worked on
4. **Blockers** - Any issues preventing progress
5. **Next Week Plan** - Planned work for next week

Task data:
${msg}

additionalInfo.description: Use LLM to summarize task data into a structured weekly report
